# Psalms 144

## Verses (15)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Praise be to the God of my strength, teaching my hands the use of the sword, and my fingers the art of fighting: | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | He is my strength, and my Rock; my high tower, and my saviour; my keeper and my hope: he gives me authority over my people. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Lord, what is man, that you keep him in mind? or the son of man that you take him into account? | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Man is like a breath: his life is like a shade which is quickly gone. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Come down, O Lord, from your heavens: at your touch let the mountains give out smoke. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | With your storm-flames send them in flight: send out your arrows for their destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Put out your hand from on high; make me free, take me safely out of the great waters, and out of the hands of strange men; | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | In whose mouths are false words, and whose right hand is a right hand of deceit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | I will make a new song to you, O God; I will make melody to you on an instrument of ten cords. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | It is God who gives salvation to kings; and who kept his servant David from the wounding sword. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Make me free, and take me out of the hands of strange men, in whose mouths are false words, and whose right hand is a right hand of deceit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Our sons are like tall young plants; and our daughters like the shining stones of a king's house; | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Our store-houses are full of all good things; and our sheep give birth to thousands and ten thousands in our fields. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Our oxen are well weighted down; our cows give birth safely; there is no going out, and there is no cry of sorrow in our open places. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Happy is the nation whose ways are so ordered: yes, happy is the nation whose God is the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
